description: ExaVault is a file transfer product from Files.com that offers hosted and on-premise FTP/SFTP/FTPS/WebDAV-based file exchange and a web file manager. Its materials describe the cloud platform as providing automation, sharing, and API-based integration for managed file workflows.
summary: ExaVault exposes a tenant-scoped REST API for file transfer and account management, authenticated with an API key plus API access token.
